verses.text: The priests, grieved, seize them; yet many believe, about five thousand men. Growth amid opposition. Persecution cannot stop the spreading word.
The priests, grieved, seize them; yet many believe, about five thousand men. Growth amid opposition. Persecution cannot stop the spreading word.
The priests, grieved, seize them; yet many believe, about five thousand men. Growth amid opposition. Persecution cannot stop the spreading word.
The priests, grieved, seize them; yet many believe, about five thousand men. Growth amid opposition. Persecution cannot stop the spreading word.
The rulers ask, 'By what power, or by what name, have ye done this?' Challenged. They demand the source of the miracle.
The rulers ask, 'By what power, or by what name, have ye done this?' Challenged. They demand the source of the miracle.
The rulers ask, 'By what power, or by what name, have ye done this?' Challenged. They demand the source of the miracle.
Peter, filled with the Spirit, by 'the name of Jesus Christ... whom ye crucified,' this man stands whole. Bold answer. He names the crucified, risen Christ.
Peter, filled with the Spirit, by 'the name of Jesus Christ... whom ye crucified,' this man stands whole. Bold answer. He names the crucified, risen Christ.
Peter, filled with the Spirit, by 'the name of Jesus Christ... whom ye crucified,' this man stands whole. Bold answer. He names the crucified, risen Christ.
This is the stone you builders set at nought; 'neither is there salvation in any other.' The only Saviour. There is no other name to save.
This is the stone you builders set at nought; 'neither is there salvation in any other.' The only Saviour. There is no other name to save.
They marvel at the boldness of 'unlearned and ignorant men,' and know they had been with Jesus. Christ's mark. Time with Christ makes the lowly bold.
They marvel at the boldness of 'unlearned and ignorant men,' and know they had been with Jesus. Christ's mark. Time with Christ makes the lowly bold.
Unable to deny the miracle, they charge them to speak no more in this name. Truth suppressed. They forbid what they cannot disprove.
Unable to deny the miracle, they charge them to speak no more in this name. Truth suppressed. They forbid what they cannot disprove.
Unable to deny the miracle, they charge them to speak no more in this name. Truth suppressed. They forbid what they cannot disprove.
Unable to deny the miracle, they charge them to speak no more in this name. Truth suppressed. They forbid what they cannot disprove.
Whether to obey you or God, judge ye; 'we cannot but speak.' Higher duty. God's command outweighs man's prohibition.
Whether to obey you or God, judge ye; 'we cannot but speak.' Higher duty. God's command outweighs man's prohibition.
They let them go, finding nothing to punish, for all glorify God. Hands tied. The people's praise restrains the rulers.
They let them go, finding nothing to punish, for all glorify God. Hands tied. The people's praise restrains the rulers.
The company lifts its voice, Lord, the heathen rage and the rulers gather against Thine Anointed. United prayer. They meet the threat by crying to God.
The company lifts its voice, Lord, the heathen rage and the rulers gather against Thine Anointed. United prayer. They meet the threat by crying to God.
The company lifts its voice, Lord, the heathen rage and the rulers gather against Thine Anointed. United prayer. They meet the threat by crying to God.
The company lifts its voice, Lord, the heathen rage and the rulers gather against Thine Anointed. United prayer. They meet the threat by crying to God.
Herod and Pilate gathered against Jesus, 'to do whatsoever thy... counsel determined.' Overruled malice. Even their plots fulfilled God's plan.
Herod and Pilate gathered against Jesus, 'to do whatsoever thy... counsel determined.' Overruled malice. Even their plots fulfilled God's plan.
Grant boldness to speak; the place is shaken, and they are filled with the Holy Ghost. Renewed power. Prayer brings fresh courage and the Spirit.
Grant boldness to speak; the place is shaken, and they are filled with the Holy Ghost. Renewed power. Prayer brings fresh courage and the Spirit.
Grant boldness to speak; the place is shaken, and they are filled with the Holy Ghost. Renewed power. Prayer brings fresh courage and the Spirit.
The believers are 'of one heart and of one soul,' sharing all; 'great grace was upon them all.' United and generous. Love makes them hold all in common.
The believers are 'of one heart and of one soul,' sharing all; 'great grace was upon them all.' United and generous. Love makes them hold all in common.
The believers are 'of one heart and of one soul,' sharing all; 'great grace was upon them all.' United and generous. Love makes them hold all in common.
The believers are 'of one heart and of one soul,' sharing all; 'great grace was upon them all.' United and generous. Love makes them hold all in common.
Barnabas sells his land and lays the money at the apostles' feet. Glad giving. He gives freely for the good of all.
Barnabas sells his land and lays the money at the apostles' feet. Glad giving. He gives freely for the good of all.
